title: Propulsion Assignment
description: The assignment is available online. Submit a link to the landing page of your Web application running on Netlify.

title: Combustion Analysis
description: Analyze combustion processes and submit a detailed report on fuel types and efficiency.

title: Nozzle Design Project
description: Design a nozzle for a rocket engine and submit a detailed report with calculations.

title: Aerodynamics Quiz
description: Complete the quiz on aerodynamic fundamentals covering airfoils and boundary layers.

title: Flow Analysis
description: Analyze subsonic and supersonic flow patterns and submit findings.

title: Heating Analysis
description: Study aerodynamic heating effects and submit a thermal analysis report.

title: Structural Design Task
description: Design a spacecraft structural component using stress analysis principles.

title: Orbital Mechanics Problem Set
description: Solve orbital mechanics problems involving Kepler's laws and transfer orbits.

title: Systems Engineeringtic Report
description: Write a systems engineering report covering spacecraft power systems.
